description: Biotype classification of the transcript
Chromosome on which the transcript is located
Genomic end position of the transcript
List of exons that make up the transcript
Chromosome on which the exon is located
Genomic end position of the exon
Ensembl identifier of the exon (ENSE###) [bioregistry:ensembl]
Genomic start position of the exon
Strand orientation of the exon
List of curation flags describing the transcript (e.g. MANE, APPRIS, GENCODE Primary, Ensembl canonical)
Category of the transcript flag (e.g. mane, appris, gencode_primary, ensembl_canonical)
Value of the transcript flag within its category
Flag indicating if the transcript is the Ensembl canonical transcript for the gene
Ensembl protein identifier for the transcript (ENSP###); null for non-coding transcripts [bioregistry:ensembl]
Genomic start position of the transcript
Strand orientation of the transcript
Ensembl gene identifier of the target the transcript belongs to [bioregistry:ensembl]
Ensembl identifier of the transcript (ENST###) [bioregistry:ensembl]
Transcription Start Site (TSS) genomic position, derived from the transcript's strand and coordinates
UniProt identifiers of the protein translated from the transcript
